chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.object: Unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Unit price
triplets.object: does not change with future price updates

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: Products to be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund

entities_post_resolution.name: Active/Inactive Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: A boolean flag indicating whether the associated entity is currently active and can participate in business processes (e.g., customers able to place orders or items currently for sale).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Key Attributes: - Active/inactive status | | IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO | | | IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether currently for sale | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID field is a self-referential foreign key in the TB_CATEGORY table that points to the parent category, modeling the categoryHierarchy.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | |  - CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO | | | CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO | | Key Attributes: - Belongs to exactly one Category | Category         → TB_CATEGORY | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES | | | PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | | PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Destination Customer Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: Customer Address: the postal address associated with a customer used as the destination for shipments or deliveries.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- Destination Customer Address | This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset. | Definition: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | Key Attributes: - Unique Customer ID | Key Attributes: - Valid email address (required for login) | Key Attributes: - One or more delivery/billing addresses | Key Attributes: - Geographic region for tax calculation | Key Attributes: - Active/inactive status | Must place at least one order to remain active | Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | Related Concepts: CustomerAddress, SalesOrder | Key Attributes: - References exactly one Customer | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | Shipment Relationshi

entities_post_resolution.name: Delivered At
entities_post_resolution.definition: Shipment is the entity representing a package movement for a Sales Order, identified by SHIPMENT_ID, linked to one Sales Order, and tracked through statuses such as PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED, with a delivery timestamp DELIVERED_AT.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| DELIVERED_AT | DATETIME | Delivery timestamp | YES | | - Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | | WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Source warehouse | YES | | | TRACKING_NUMBER | VARCHAR(100) | Carrier tracking number | YES | | | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO | | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED | - References exactly one Sales Order | - Destination Customer Address | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Items
entities_post_resolution.definition: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | - References exactly one Product | - Quantity of units ordered | - Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | - Extended amount = quantity × unit price | | ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO | | | ORDER_ID | BIGINT | Unique order identifier | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | | LINE_ID | INT | Primary Key | auto-increment | | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | | LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO | | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | Must contain at least one Order Line Item | Definition: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Payment is a transactional entity representing a payment made against a Sales Order, identified by PAYMENT_ID and linked to the corresponding ORDER_ID, including the payment amount; a Sales Order can have one or more Payments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | Payment          → PAYMENT | - References exactly one Sales Order | - Payment amount | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: A product is a catalog item offered for sale that has a unique SKU and belongs to exactly one category.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Key Attributes: - Belongs to exactly one Category | Key Attributes: - Unique SKU code | Key Attributes: - Unit price in base currency (EUR) | Key Attributes: - Active/inactive status | Must belong to a valid category before being sold | Examples: - "Wireless Bluetooth Headphones - Black" (SKU: ELE-001234) | Examples: - "Cotton T-Shirt - Medium, Blue" (SKU: CLO-002345) | - References exactly one Product | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Product          → TB_PRODUCT | Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a customer to supply products, referencing exactly one customer.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Definition: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products. | Key Attributes: - References exactly one Customer | Must contain at least one Order Line Item | Key Attributes: - Unique Order ID | Key Attributes: - Total monetary value | Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED | - A Sales Order must contain at least one line item | - References exactly one Sales Order | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | SalesOrder       → SALES_

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category
entities_post_resolution.definition: TB_PRODUCT represents the product dimension with a unique product identifier (PRODUCT_ID) and related SKU information in the product catalog.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
- CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Unique category identifier | NO | | | CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO | | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES | | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | Category         → TB_CATEGORY | | PRODUCT_ID | INT | Unique product identifier | NO | | | SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO | | | PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | | UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | | IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether currently for sale | NO | | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | Product          → TB_PRODUCT

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price At
entities_post_resolution.definition: Price per unit (in EUR) that is applied to a transaction, representing the unit cost at the time the order was placed and potentially reflecting a historical value.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | | UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | - Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates | Key Attributes: - Unit price in base currency (EUR)

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: Return Policy: A policy that allows customers to return products within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Sku
entities_post_resolution.definition: Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) is a unique code used in inventory and catalog systems to identify a specific product item.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO | | Key Attributes: - Unique SKU code

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identity, contact details, regional segmentation, account creation timestamp, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products, including identifiers, naming, category linkage, pricing, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores the hierarchical category data for products, including each category's name and a reference to its parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores header information for customer sales orders, including identifiers, order timing, total amount, status, payment confirmation, delivery timing, and record creation time.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the line-by-line details of items on each order, including the product, quantity, unit price, and line total amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments made for orders, including method, amount, status, and timestamps for creation and confirmation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments linked to customer orders, including shipment timing, destination warehouse, tracking, and current status.
